sections.paragraph:
f.-

(1) breath, spirit-(a) the Spirit of God imparting life and wisdom, i.q. רוּחַ אֱלֹהִים; Job 32:8 33:4 compare 26:4 .-(b) the spirit of man, soul, ψυχή (comp. נֶפֶשׁ No. 2), Gen 2:7 Job 27:3. Meton. (that which has breath), a living creature, animans, i.q. נֶפֶשׁ No. 3, Deu 20:16 Jos 10:40. Once used for the mind, Pro 20:27.

(2) the panting of those who are angry, used of the anger of God, Isa 30:33 Psa 18:16.
